text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ouch... Letting my mind drift during practice
wasn't my smartest move. I need to focus on
what's happening in front of me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I won't be doing that again. All right, back to
training.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ow!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't say it doesn't... But this is nothing
compared to the injury I suffered when I was little.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it'll be fine once we wrap it up. Now, let's
not waste any more time.
choice_data_list: You need to take a break.

I'll stop you if it looks like you're pushing
yourself, okay?

I'll stop you if it looks like you're pushing
yourself, okay?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it'll be fine once we wrap it up. Now, let's
not waste any more time.
choice_data_list: You need to take a break.

I'll stop you if it looks like you're pushing
yourself, okay?

I'll stop you if it looks like you're pushing
yourself, okay?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But my rivals will get even farther ahead if I don't
keep practicing.
choice_data_list:
And you think keeping up with them is worth
risking a major injury?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I guess I can't argue with that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If I continue practicing while injured, it's far more
likely that I'll seriously hurt myself and be forced
to lose even more progress...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yet despite understanding that logically, I just can't... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... I'll do as you say and take a break.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That's fine by me!

I treat her injury with some basic first aid and
keep a close eye on her condition.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Phew... It feels a lot better. Thank you. Shall we
head to the track?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ow...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The area around the injury is getting a little
swollen, but it's all right. I just need some
painkillers, and I'll be—
choice_data_list: No. No more running. You promised, remember?
No. No more running. You promised, remember?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: B-but!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... That disapproving glare of yours hurts me
far more than my actual injury.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Fine... I'll go get it looked at.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It feels fine when I run on it. I should be able to
keep training.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I won't. I know it's still not fully healed, and I
don't want it to get worse, so I'll be careful.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You've always believed in me... and met my
demands accordingly. Now it's my turn to heed
your advice.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll start with about ten percent of my
strength and see how I fare.

Training goes just fine, and her injury heals with
no problems!
